hero.title: Your Sea Day with a Private Skipper
hero.subtitle: Board a Cap Camarat 7.15 WA to explore Porquerolles and the most beautiful coves. Let us guide you, enjoy the sun, we'll take care of the rest.
hero.parking: Free parking & EV charger 1 min away

skipper.title: Sail with peace of mind
skipper.subtitle: Your Skipper: Thibault
skipper.desc1: Passionate about the sea since childhood and a true local, I know the Var coast perfectly, from the crystal clear waters of Porquerolles to the secret coves of the Giens Peninsula.
skipper.desc2: My goal? To offer you an unforgettable and safe day. Whether you're looking for a quiet anchorage to relax or the best snorkeling spots, let me guide you!
skipper.bullet1: Zero stress: no deposit, no material responsibility
skipper.bullet3: Expert knowledge of the best spots

features.title: Features & Extras
features.sunbed_desc: At the front of the boat, the perfect space to sunbathe comfortably.
features.dining_desc: Eat in the shade thanks to the large sun awning. Bring your picnic!
features.fun_desc: Masks and snorkels provided. A paddleboard is available upon request!
features.comfort_desc: Cooler available for your drinks, and Bluetooth music.
features.shower_desc: Rinse off after a swim thanks to the swim ladder and shower.
features.cabin_desc: To take a nap, change clothes, or keep your belongings dry.

itineraries.title: Must-See Destinations
itineraries.subtitle: Departing from La Seyne-sur-Mer, everything is possible. Choose your vibe!
itineraries.porquerolles_desc: Sail to Porquerolles Island (Notre-Dame beach, Argent beach). Anchor in lagoon-blue waters, perfect for a heavenly day.
itineraries.sicie_desc: Discover dizzying cliffs and the iconic Deux Frères rocks. An incredible spot for snorkeling with fish-rich seabeds.
itineraries.embiez_desc: Paul Ricard's island offers a preserved and wild setting. Many small secluded coves await you for a peaceful anchorage.
itineraries.giens_desc: Explore sea caves and steep cliffs on the south side of Giens. A spectacular landscape reserved for those arriving by sea.
itineraries.mejean_desc: Head towards Toulon and sail along the pine-fringed coast to discover the clear waters of Méjean cove and Cap Brun.

pricing.title: Our Packages
pricing.subtitle: Net rates with Skipper included. NO DEPOSIT. (Fuel not included: refilled at the pump at the end of the day based on your consumption).
pricing.sunset_desc: Enjoy the sunset at sea. Ideal for drinks with friends or a romantic evening.

steps.title: How it works?
steps.step1_desc: We chat on the phone to define the date, your desires, and the ideal package.
steps.step2_desc: Meet at the port of La Seyne-sur-Mer. Just hop on board!
steps.step3_desc: Relax. I take care of the navigation, you enjoy the sea.

testimonials.title: They Loved It
testimonials.review1: A magical day! Thibault took us to a beautiful secret cove. The boat is super comfortable.
testimonials.review2: Great experience without the stress of a deposit or navigating. The huge sunbed is a real plus!
testimonials.review3: Amazing sunset cruise facing Les Deux Frères. Highly recommended.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What happens if the weather is bad?
faq.a1: Safety first! In case of rough seas or strong winds, the trip is rescheduled or canceled free of charge.
faq.q2: Can we bring our own food and alcohol?
faq.a2: Of course! A cooler is available on board, and the rear dining area is perfect for eating.
faq.a3: Yes, the navigation adapts to stay very calm and safe for the little ones.

location.title: Access & Parking
location.subtitle: An easy departure in the heart of La Seyne-sur-Mer
location.main_parking: Preferred Parking: Parking du Parc de la Navale
location.main_desc: Ideally located just a 1-minute walk from our meeting point, featuring EV charging stations.
location.list: Parking : 1, 83500 La Seyne-sur-Mer, Parking Port de La Seyne-sur-Mer, Parking Quai de la Marine, Parking Port de la Rade de Toulon, Entrée parking Salle des Mariages, Parking des Esplageolles.

contact.title: Ready to drop anchor?
contact.desc: Booking is done directly over the phone! Call me to check availability, discuss your plans, and customize your day.
